description: Indulge in the ultimate culinary experience with our irresistible Garlic Shrimp Pasta Recipe, a dish that perfectly balances the rich flavors of garlic, juicy shrimp, and creamy sauce, all wrapped around tender pasta.
ingredients: [{"name": "large shrimp, peeled and deveined", "unit": "pound", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "garlic, minced", "unit": "cloves", "amount": "4"}, {"name": "olive oil", "unit": "tablespoons", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "Salt and pepper", "unit": null, "amount": null}, {"name": "Italian seasoning", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "fettuccine or pasta of your choice", "unit": "ounces", "amount": "12"}, {"name": "butter", "unit": "tablespoon", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "heavy cream", "unit": "cup", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "parmesan cheese, grated", "unit": "cup", "amount": "0.5"}, {"name": "parsley, chopped (optional)", "unit": "tablespoon", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "Lemon wedges, for serving (optional)", "unit": null, "amount": null}]
instructions: Boil the pasta in salted water until al dente, then drain. In a large skillet, heat butter and olive oil over medium heat and sauté the garlic until fragrant. Add the shrimp and cook until they turn pink and are just cooked through. Pour in the heavy cream and let it simmer until the sauce slightly thickens. Toss in the pasta, mix well to coat with the sauce, and garnish with chopped fresh parsley before serving.
notes: Sauté the garlic gently to release its aroma without burning, and adjust seasoning to enhance the natural flavors of shrimp and cream.
tags: Italian, seafood, pasta, creamy, garlic, shrimp
